arts.ttl: ‘Took it as a compliment’ - Paul Heckingbottom identifies Coventry City game plan that 'suited' him - CoventryLive
arts.sum: The Sky Blues manager switched to a back three with wing-backs for Saturday’s trip to Lancashire and Heckingbottom admitted he knew what was coming in the second half when the visitors threw on more attacking players - Brandon Thomas-Asante, Haji Wright and Tatsuhiro Sakamoto - from the bench. Preston North End boss Paul Heckingbottom says he took it as a “compliment” that his opposite number at Coventry City changed his formation at Deepdale.

arts.ttl: Bidwell, Wilson, Allen, Raphael - Coventry City injury news ahead of Queens Park Rangers - CoventryLive
arts.sum: Asked if it is a similar issue to Jamie Allen’s knee ligament injury, the City boss said: “Yeah, very similar. With just eight points on the board from their opening ten league matches, Mark Robins' men are just outside the relegation zone on goal difference, and clearly need a pick-me-up from their latest block of games that includes hosting Luton Town at the CBS Arena this weekend ahead of an away trip to Middlesbrough.
